meta.name: Ranjan Kumar Nayak
meta.summary: 19+ years spanning EDW, lakehouses, and information architecture across finance, telecom, insurance, retail, and CPG. Currently at IIIT Hyderabad, fine-tuning open-source LLMs for NL2SQL and data engineering applications.

bullets: Developing NL2SQL system for enterprise databases — schema linking, prompt engineering, RL-based fine-tuning on BIRD benchmark.
Built AspectForge: four-stage RAG pipeline with BM25/FAISS hybrid retrieval for multilingual (EN/DE) customer support.
Developed GPAD — CodeBERT-based AI-generated code detection with entropy-weighted attention and multi-task learning.

experience.role: Solution Consultant / Data Modeler / Technical Consultant
bullets: Designed large-scale data lakehouse for Asia's largest insurance provider (350M+ policyholders).
Led BCBS 239 compliance for Maybank Malaysia as Product Data Analyst, managing 8-member team.
Implemented EDW based on FSLDM for MIFID-II project at OP Financial, Finland.
Onsite ETL Lead at Westpac Australia — migrated ~1,800 Informatica jobs and 10,000+ scripts.
Led data platform consolidation at SC Johnson achieving 17% operational efficiency improvement.
Designed microservice-based data pipeline for P&G's 'One Consumer Place' central data warehouse.
Led predictive churn/retention models at Vodafone Australia.
Conducted Market Basket Analysis and Customer Segmentation; grew client base by 3–5% through targeted campaigns.
Tech lead for Infomart project — standardized multi-source data for WellPoint enterprise data warehouse.
Built production support tool in VB/Oracle reducing code fix time by 15–20%.
Delivered reporting applications for Northwestern Mutual and Aetna's claim adjudication system.

projects.title: Text2SQL for Enterprise Databases
projects.description: NL2SQL system tailored for enterprise-grade databases — addressing schema complexity, ambiguity, and domain-specific query patterns. Covers prompt engineering, schema linking, and RL-based fine-tuning on the BIRD benchmark.

projects.title: AspectForge — Multilingual RAG Pipeline
projects.description: Four-stage RAG pipeline combining BM25/FAISS hybrid retrieval with aspect-aware reranking for multilingual (EN/DE) customer support response generation on ~28k support tickets.

projects.title: GPAD — AI-Generated Code Detection
projects.description: CodeBERT-based architecture incorporating entropy-weighted attention, stylometric features, and multi-task learning for binary and multi-class AI-generated code detection. Submitted to SemEval-2026 Task 13.

clients: Swedbank · Sweden (DataDNA Solution for Data Lineage and Metadata Analysis)

education.detail: NLP (Spring 2026) · Advanced NLP (Monsoon 2025) · Data Systems (Spring 2025) · Statistical Methods in AI (Spring 2024)

education.school: Odisha University of Technology and Research
education.detail: Foundation in Computer Science, Data Structures, Algorithms, and Software Engineering.

achievements.title: GATE 2020 · CSE
achievements.body: Conducted by IIT Delhi — top percentile in Computer Science & Engineering among thousands of national candidates.

achievements.title: Full-time Researcher · IIIT Hyderabad
achievements.body: Transitioned from 19+ years of enterprise data engineering into applied NLP research — NL2SQL, LLM fine-tuning, and RAG systems.

achievements.title: 5 Industry Certifications
achievements.body: Databricks · AWS Cloud Practitioner · Teradata 14 · AHIP (Part A & B) · LOMA 280
